expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response asks for the copy, the goal, and the traffic source before auditing, stating 'I'd just be auditing my own assumptions, which won't help you.'

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: The response contains no invented page content — it only asks for the real page and explains what areas it will examine once received.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response offers 'I can give you a general pricing page audit checklist' as an explicitly labeled fallback if the copy cannot be shared.
